recipe.title: High-Protein Chicken Taco Soup
recipe.summary: A hearty chicken taco soup made with rotisserie chicken, bone broth, pinto beans, corn, cilantro, and avocado for more than 40 grams of protein in a satisfying 12-ounce bowl.
ingredients: 32 ounces Simple Truth Organic Chicken Bone Broth
20 ounces mostly skinless rotisserie chicken breast, shredded
1 (15-ounce) can pinto beans, drained and rinsed
2 teaspoons Knorr tomato bouillon with chicken flavor
1 medium avocado, thinly sliced and divided among the servings
instructions: Pour the chicken bone broth into a large pot over medium heat.
Stir in the Knorr tomato bouillon, granulated garlic, paprika, and cumin until combined.
Add the shredded rotisserie chicken, drained pinto beans, and drained corn.
Bring the soup to a gentle simmer and cook for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped cilantro just before serving.
Divide the soup into approximately five 12-ounce servings and top each bowl with sliced avocado.
tips: Use mostly skinless rotisserie chicken breast to keep the calories consistent while maximizing protein.
Taste the soup before adding salt because the bone broth and tomato bouillon already contain sodium.
Measure the finished soup into approximately 12-ounce portions for the closest match to the listed nutrition.
Nutrition is approximate and may vary depending on the rotisserie chicken, bone broth, canned ingredients, and avocado size.

seo.meta_description: Make this easy chicken taco soup with rotisserie chicken, bone broth, beans, corn, cilantro, and avocado for approximately 48g protein and 390 calories.

images.image_prompt: A realistic bowl of hearty chicken taco soup with visible shredded chicken breast, pinto beans, golden corn, tomato-colored broth, fresh cilantro, and thin avocado slices on top. No tortilla chips, cheese, sour cream, tomatoes, onions, jalapenos, or other unlisted ingredients.
images.alt_text: High-protein chicken taco soup with shredded chicken, pinto beans, corn, cilantro, and avocado.
